These reference out-of-lane IMG1605 frame/partial-label and scored-clip drift. Other unresolved tests: test_public_eval_persists_probability_maxima_and_nonfinite_count and test_generate_corpus_is_deterministic_and_fast_for_small_cpu_sample. Scaffold failure: unknown category count is 3 from other new CLIs, not this dataset-classified exporter. Performance failure: train_court_model_v2 CPU smoke timed out after 540s. None of the 32 tests imports the owned exporter, but a clean pre-lane baseline was not run, so they are not marked proven pre-existing.

honest_issues: Overall result is PARTIAL because the mandatory full tests/racketsport suite is not green: 32 failures remain outside the two-file ownership fence.
Human annotation quality is not measured or certified. The reviewer must complete the audit CSV before applying the >=98% precision, >=95% recall, and per-source quarantine rules.

Only 186 of 210 requested unique audit frames could be staged: hilab has 6 total eligible images, pickle-es3fs has 12, and pickleball-seg has 3. Frames were not duplicated to manufacture 15-sample counts.
One Hemel annotation has effectively zero height outside a 512x512 frame and was excluded; the export therefore contains 47,043 valid boxes from 47,044 indexed boxes.
The source-balance artifact preserves all eligible images and reports per-family counts for downstream source-aware sampling; data.yaml itself does not resample Ultralytics training rows.

The required storage-policy check fails on unrelated holdout_eval and PBV artifacts in the shared dirty worktree. Scaffold and dead-code commands themselves exited 0; dead-code reported 603 sources and 0 unknown Python sources.
A superseded pre-family-fix run was preserved at runs/lanes/person_p1_roboflow_20260721/roboflow_person_pre_family_fix_20260721T131633PDT; the authoritative artifact is roboflow_person/.
next: Have a human review audit/index.html and fill review_template.csv; quarantine any source below 90%, recompute retention, and only then feed P2. Separately, the owners of the out-of-lane court/server/scaffold/storage/runtime failures must restore the wide suite before this lane can be upgraded from PARTIAL.
